AIR (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $52,460,106Details
International Box Office $37,600,000
Worldwide Box Office $90,060,106
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $233,590
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $533,920
Total $767,510
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The unbelievable, game-changing partnership between a then rookie Michael Jordan and Nike’s fledgling basketball division revolutionized the world of sports and contemporary culture with the Air Jordan brand. This story follows the career-defining gamble of an unconventional team with everything on the line, the uncompromising vision of a mother who knows the worth of her son’s immense talent, and the basketball phenom who would become the greatest of all time.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,456,279 (27.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.63 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,507 opening theaters/3,507 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $57,351,262

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 5th, 2023 (Wide) by Amazon Studios
International Releases: March 5th, 2023 (Limited) (Finland)
April 5th, 2023 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
April 5th, 2023 (Wide) (Spain)
April 5th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
April 5th, 2023 (Wide) (Taiwan)
Video Release: May 12th, 2023 by Prime Video
MPA Rating: R for language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2756 (cert #54110), 11/2/2022)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Directing Yourself, Screenplay Written By the Star
Plot point: Basketball, Biography, Fashion
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Amazon Studios, Skydance Sports, Mandalay Pictures, Skydance Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The unbelievable, game-changing partnership between a then rookie Michael Jordan and Nike’s fledgling basketball division revolutionized the world of sports and contemporary culture with the Air Jordan brand. This story follows the career-defining gamble of an unconventional team with everything on the line, the uncompromising vision of a mother who knows the worth of her son’s immense talent, and the basketball phenom who would become the greatest of all time.
